title: Lime
description: Lime is a mod that brings features blocks, mobs  and mechanics from new Minecraft versions back into the older ones  (1.20.1 for now) for forge
body:
![the logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd2adb663e0e120d901767d0384e5aef17751db6.png)

# WHAT IS LIME 🍋‍🟩?
   **  Lime is a mod that adds the new features from Minecraft 1.21.x into 1.20.1**
##  **Features**

1. Added cow (warm) variant from 1.21.5
2. Added the spear from 1.21.11
3. Added chicken variants from 1.21.5
4. added nautilus and its baby version from 1.21.11
5. added copper armor in 1.21.9
![nautilus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d950a7dfb10bdfd98359d8fb169f3e825769ff5.png)

                        
    ![warm chicken](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5be9eede68059ea15e857b3ff2dadf1af4e7573e.png)


![cold chicken](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69524d107bb40581f5b89e32f94eda1dccb1e262.png)


## **FAQ❔**

Q: Will this mod change my Minecraft?
---------------------------------------
A: Since it adds many new items and features, it will significantly change how the game behaves.
     
   
Q: Do I need any dependencies to install this mod?
---------------------------------------------------
A: No, just drop it in your ```mods``` folder and you're done!


Q: Do I need this on my client and my server?
----------------------------------------------
A: Yes, since it adds new items and features, it will require installation on both the client and the server.

Q: does the updates come quick?
--------------------------------------
A: No,we need time to make update upload files editing and coding but we try our best to make it fast


# ⚡ Why LimeBackport?

**Lightweight and dependency-free** — just drop it into your mods folder.

**Compatible with Forge & NeoForge.**

**Fast updates as new Minecraft features become available.**

**Survival-friendly** — keeps gameplay balanced while adding fun content.
